changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: WITH vote_source AS ( SELECT 1005::BIGINT AS post_id, (100000 + n)::BIGINT AS user_id, n, 68 AS base_support FROM generate_series(0, 359) AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1008::BIGINT AS post_id, (101000 + n)::BIGINT AS user_id, n, 54 AS base_support FROM generate_series(0, 419) AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1007::BIGINT AS post_id, (102000 + n)::BIGINT AS user_id, n, 73 AS base_support FROM generate_series(0, 549) AS n ), profiles AS ( SELECT post_id, user_id, n, base_support, CASE n % 6 WHEN 0 THEN 'LEFT' WHEN 1 THEN 'CENTRE_LEFT' WHEN 2 THEN 'CENTRE' WHEN 3 THEN 'CENTRE_RIGHT' WHEN 4 THEN 'RIGHT' ELSE 'APOLITICAL' END AS political_persuasion, CASE n % 7 WHEN 0 THEN 'AGE_18_24' WHEN 1 THEN 'AGE_25_34' WHEN 2 THEN 'AGE_35_44' WHEN 3 THEN 'AGE_45_54' WHEN 4 THEN 'AGE_55_64' WHEN 5 THEN 'AGE_65_PLUS' ELSE 'AGE_25_34' END AS age_range, CASE n % 5 WHEN 0 THEN 'WOMAN' WHEN 1 THEN 'MAN' WHEN 2 THEN 'NON_BINARY' WHEN 3 THEN 'WOMAN' ELSE 'MAN' END AS gender, CASE n % 8 WHEN 0 THEN 'ASIAN' WHEN 1 THEN 'BLACK' WHEN 2 THEN 'MIXED' WHEN 3 THEN 'OTHER' ELSE 'WHITE' END AS race, CASE WHEN n % 10 = 0 THEN 'United States' ELSE 'United Kingdom' END AS country, CASE n % 9 WHEN 0 THEN 'London' WHEN 1 THEN 'Bristol' WHEN 2 THEN 'Manchester' WHEN 3 THEN 'Glasgow' WHEN 4 THEN 'Cardiff' WHEN 5 THEN 'Leeds' WHEN 6 THEN 'Birmingham' WHEN 7 THEN 'Newcastle' ELSE 'Dallas' END AS region, CASE n % 4 WHEN 0 THEN 'URBAN' WHEN 1 THEN 'SUBURBAN' WHEN 2 THEN 'TOWN' ELSE 'RURAL' END AS urban_rural, CASE n % 7 WHEN 0 THEN 'GREATER_LONDON' WHEN 1 THEN 'BRISTOL' WHEN 2 THEN 'GREATER_MANCHESTER' WHEN 3 THEN 'WEST_YORKSHIRE' WHEN 4 THEN 'WEST_MIDLANDS' WHEN 5 THEN 'TYNE_AND_WEAR' ELSE 'CARDIFF' END AS uk_county, CASE n % 6 WHEN 0 THEN 'BACHELORS' WHEN 1 THEN 'MASTERS' WHEN 2 THEN 'HIGH_SCHOOL' WHEN 3 THEN 'VOCATIONAL' WHEN 4 THEN 'DOCTORATE' ELSE 'NO_FORMAL_QUALIFICATIONS' END AS education, CASE n % 7 WHEN 0 THEN 'EMPLOYED_FULL_TIME' WHEN 1 THEN 'EMPLOYED_PART_TIME' WHEN 2 THEN 'SELF_EMPLOYED' WHEN 3 THEN 'STUDENT' WHEN 4 THEN 'RETIRED' WHEN 5 THEN 'CARER' ELSE 'UNEMPLOYED' END AS occupation, CASE n % 8 WHEN 0 THEN 'HEALTHCARE' WHEN 1 THEN 'EDUCATION' WHEN 2 THEN 'IT_TECHNOLOGY' WHEN 3 THEN 'CONSTRUCTION' WHEN 4 THEN 'RETAIL' WHEN 5 THEN 'PUBLIC_SECTOR' WHEN 6 THEN 'FINANCE' ELSE 'HOSPITALITY' END AS employment_sector, CASE n % 5 WHEN 0 THEN 'UNDER_25K' WHEN 1 THEN 'BETWEEN_25K_AND_50K' WHEN 2 THEN 'BETWEEN_50K_AND_100K' WHEN 3 THEN 'BETWEEN_100K_AND_150K' ELSE 'BETWEEN_151K_AND_200K' END AS personal_income_range, CASE n % 5 WHEN 0 THEN 'BETWEEN_25K_AND_50K' WHEN 1 THEN 'BETWEEN_50K_AND_100K' WHEN 2 THEN 'BETWEEN_100K_AND_150K' WHEN 3 THEN 'BETWEEN_151K_AND_200K' ELSE 'OVER_200K' END AS household_income_range, CASE n % 4 WHEN 0 THEN 'NO' WHEN 1 THEN 'MUM' WHEN 2 THEN 'DAD' ELSE 'GUARDIAN' END AS parent, ((n % 10) + 1)::TEXT AS news_frequency, CASE WHEN n % 3 = 0 THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS has_pet, CASE n % 4 WHEN 0 THEN 'DOG' WHEN 1 THEN 'CAT' WHEN 2 THEN 'OTHER' ELSE NULL END AS pet_type, CASE n % 3 WHEN 0 THEN 'EARLY_BIRD' WHEN 1 THEN 'NIGHT_OWL' ELSE 'NEITHER' END AS chronotype, CASE n % 3 WHEN 0 THEN 'OPTIMIST' WHEN 1 THEN 'PESSIMIST' ELSE 'REALIST' END AS outlook, CASE WHEN n % 9 = 0 THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS neurodivergent, CASE WHEN n % 11 = 0 THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS has_disability, CASE n % 4 WHEN 0 THEN 'OWN' WHEN 1 THEN 'RENT_PRIVATE' WHEN 2 THEN 'RENT_SOCIAL' ELSE 'LIVE_WITH_FAMILY' END AS housing_status, CASE n % 5 WHEN 0 THEN 'HOUSE' WHEN 1 THEN 'FLAT' WHEN 2 THEN 'MAISONETTE' WHEN 3 THEN 'BUNGALOW' ELSE 'OTHER' END AS property_type FROM vote_source ), scored_profiles AS ( SELECT *, LEAST(88, GREATEST(18, base_support + CASE political_persuasion WHEN 'LEFT' THEN 8 WHEN 'CENTRE_LEFT' THEN 5 WHEN 'CENTRE' THEN 1 WHEN 'CENTRE_RIGHT' THEN -3 WHEN 'RIGHT' THEN -7 ELSE -1 END + CASE age_range WHEN 'AGE_18_24' THEN 5 WHEN 'AGE_25_34' THEN 4 WHEN 'AGE_35_44' THEN 1 WHEN 'AGE_65_PLUS' THEN -5 ELSE 0 END + CASE urban_rural WHEN 'URBAN' THEN 4 WHEN 'SUBURBAN' THEN 1 WHEN 'RURAL' THEN -4 ELSE 0 END + CASE post_id WHEN 1005 THEN CASE WHEN occupation IN ('STUDENT', 'EMPLOYED_FULL_TIME') THEN 3 ELSE 0 END WHEN 1007 THEN CASE WHEN region IN ('London', 'Manchester', 'Bristol') THEN 4 ELSE 0 END WHEN 1008 THEN CASE WHEN has_disability = 'true' OR outlook = 'OPTIMIST' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END )) AS support_threshold FROM profiles ) INSERT INTO votes (post_id, user_id, option_id, characteristic_snapshot) SELECT post_id, user_id, (SELECT o.id FROM post_vote_option o WHERE o.post_id = scored_profiles.post_id AND o.semantic_key = CASE WHEN ((n * 37 + post_id) % 100) < support_threshold THEN 'AGREE' ELSE 'DISAGREE' END) AS option_id, jsonb_strip_nulls(jsonb_build_object( 'politicalPersuasion', political_persuasion, 'ageRange', age_range, 'gender', gender, 'race', race, 'country', country, 'region', region, 'urbanRural', urban_rural, 'ukCounty', CASE WHEN country = 'United Kingdom' THEN uk_county ELSE NULL END, 'education', education, 'occupation', occupation, 'employmentSector', employment_sector, 'personalIncomeRange', personal_income_range, 'householdIncomeRange', household_income_range, 'parent', parent, 'newsFrequency', news_frequency, 'hasPet', has_pet, 'petType', pet_type, 'chronotype', chronotype, 'outlook', outlook, 'neurodivergent', neurodivergent, 'hasDisability', has_disability, 'housingStatus', housing_status, 'propertyType', property_type )) AS characteristic_snapshot FROM scored_profiles ORDER BY post_id, user_id;
